artifacts.excerpt: Don't get lost in all the side quests. Work on the main quest for once in your life.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-01-23
artifacts.excerpt:
From a long conversation I had with someone who has legally administered psychedelics to 600+ people and who is one of the most self-aware persons I have ever met:

Psychedelics don't treat narcissism.

This seems very important to know about. Don't put your hope there.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-07-02
artifacts.excerpt: I still don't understand how reality works. Do you?
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, way, need.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2021-12-29
artifacts.excerpt:
He who controls your political theory controls your sense of agency.

A corollary: you are only ever as agentic as your political theory says is the upper bound of rational agency.

Don't hand over your agency just like that. It's a mistake. It's really yours to keep. Own it.
